verbatim_quote: So, you know, if you take an open-source model, just because that's the one I can actually closely observe, such as 1.8b or something, and you run it on 128,000 contexts.
gloss: [METRIC] So, you know, if you take an open-source model, just because that's the one I can actually closely observe, such as 1.8b or something, and you run it on 128,000 contexts.
